title: Summit Wine Bottle Holder
features: Spiral shaped wine bottle holder with 2 wine glass holders
Bottle holder can be submerged in water to keep wine cool
Holders securely hold glasses to stop them tumbling over
Perfect for camping, picnics, beach outings and barbecues
Stainless steel with sharp ends to easily insert into ground
description: Product Description Summit Wine Bottle & Glass Holders. Spiral wine bottle holder and 2 wine glass holders. Bottle holder can be submerged in water to keep wine cool. Holders stop glasses tumbling over on uneven ground. Stylish stainless steel design. Perfect for picnics, camping and BBQs. Designed by outdoor specialists Summit, this bottle and glass holder set is perfect for picnics, barbecues and summer parties. Forget about spillages caused by placing a wine bottle and glasses on bumpy ground, because the holders provide a safe and stable place to put them. The bottle and glass holders are made from stainless steel with spikes to easily insert them in the ground. You can also submerge the bottle holder in water to keep your bubbly nice and cool, making it perfect for a riverside picnic. Includes 1 bottle holder and 2 wine glass holders. Brand: Summit Includes 1 x wine bottle holder Includes 2 x wine glass holders Stainless steel for outdoor use Stakes to easily insert into ground Bottle holder height: 44cm (approx.) Wine glass holders: 28cm (approx.) Ideal for picnics, camping and BBQs Safety Warning Attention Do not use the wine bottle holder near heat sources. Make sure the holder is firmly anchored in the ground before placing bottles or jars on it. Avoid use during strong winds or on uneven surfaces to avoid falls.
